privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic GeoJSON data generated by setup_task.sh. Data consists of 2 polygon precincts (Precinct A at x range -122.5 to -122.4, Precinct B at x range -122.4 to -122.3, both y range 37.5 to 37.6) and 5 point features representing polling places. Precinct A spatially contains 2 polling places (Lincoln Elementary at x=-122.48, Central Library at x=-122.42), and Precinct B contains 3 polling places (Westside Community Center at x=-122.38, Fire Station 4 at x=-122.35, Veterans Hall at x=-122.32). The task requires using QGIS's 'Join Attributes by Location (Summary)' tool to create a polygon output with count and concatenated name fields for each precinct.
